entry.title: Re: Dollar sign formating not showing in front
entry.content: Hi William, I have tried changing it at syste administration and user profile. There is not change. The dollar sign is still showing behind the amount.

entry.title: Re: Help Joining OITW with the Union of INV1 and RIN1
entry.content:
Hi,

I think it is reasonably simple. You are almost there, like you said:

SELECT
TBL."SKU",
TBL."DESCRIPCION",
MAX(TBL."TOTAL") AS MAX_VENTA
/* T0. fields here as needed */
FROM
(
SELECT
MES,
SKU,
DESCRIPCION,
SUM(TOTAL) AS TOTAL
FROM
(
SELECT
MONTH(T3."DocDate") AS MES,
T3."ItemCode" AS SKU,
T3."Dscription" AS DESCRIPCION,
T3."Quantity" AS TOTAL,
T3."WhsCode"
FROM INV1 T3
WHERE T3."ItemCode" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
MONTH(T3."DocDate") AS MES,
T3."ItemCode" AS SKU,
T3."Dscription" AS DESCRIPCION,
-T3."Quantity" AS TOTAL,
T3."WhsCode"
FROM RIN1 T3
WHERE T3."ItemCode" IS NOT NULL
) TABLA1
GROUP BY MES, SKU, DESCRIPCION
ORDER BY MES, SKU
) TBL
INNER JOIN OITW T0 ON TBL."SKU" = T0."ItemCode" AND TBL."WhsCode" = T0."WhsCode"
GROUP BY SKU, DESCRIPCION /* remember to also group the necessary T0 fields */
ORDER BY SKU

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: /scwm/adgi - Post GI - API or FM
entry.content:
Hi,

you can use class /SCWM/CL_RGI_SCRAP_SRVC with method scrap_handle for this.

With methods like get_physical_stock  you can select the stock.

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Problems when opening a PDF in my SAPUI5 app
entry.content:
Please check the documentation for properties: displayType and isTrustedSource (sap.m.PDFViewer - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) and set it accordingly - this should solve the issue.

In case you still face issues, please create a support incident and we shall take a look

entry.title: Re: Problems when opening a PDF in my SAPUI5 app
entry.content:
Hi Edson,
Please check the below note. 

PDFViewer Note

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @StephanieMarley Thanks for letting me know about the tech group!!

entry.title: Re: DRTM Performance Reviews | Active / inactive period
entry.content:
Hi @simone_h 

Time Period is the length of time (in days, months or years) for which data in the selected purge object is retained while user is in active or inactive status  Here's related user guide

And each purge object has a base date and retention time is calculated based on base date and configured time period. The base date for DRTM performance review is form completion date.

So for your first requirement "3 years after completion", you can configure 3 years for DRTM performance review for performance review forms and DRTM Objective Management for goal plans.

For the 2nd requirement "6 months after an employee has left the company", you should use master data purge instead where the base date used for retention calculation is employee termination date and configured time period

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: Re: How to Maintain Factory Calendars in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Abby,

 

I would like to know what all functionalities trigger when we do changes to existing configuration.

example :-Lead-Times in Material Master are based on 5 working days. Lead-Times in Info-Records are based on 7 calendar days.

we would like to unify this could you tell what are the consequences that will lead when we unifiy this in same calender ..?

We have arranged the virtual exam so that if you are a college student and joining us, you will have a basic background in SAP AI or related topics. We have limited seats, hence we want to help people who would be interested in upskilling to SAP more and passionate about the community.

entry.title: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4 Sys
entry.content:
Hi All,

IDOC(SUBMAS01) is being sent from EHS S4 system to SAP PO middleware and its being successfully processed E2E (SAP S4->PO->Downstream sys) for some of the EHS Specifications. But recently EHS is migrated from ECC to S4 and after data migration when some of the specifications are triggered from EHS IDOC is coming to middleware but special Characters are not getting converted to unicode  (e.g<DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN> to <DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN>) and in xml if its not getting converted its failing in middleware since these characters((&,<= ) makes xml as non well formed xml.

Could you please let us know what could be reason that some specifications IDOC gets triggered with unicode conversion for special characters(&,<=) and for some specifications IDOC is not converting these special characters to unicode.

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: Re: Realtime (delta) Data Replication from SAP Analytics Cloud to BW/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Zili,

thanks for your response. Yes, restricting to a specific SAC model works.

By the way, on Datasphere site I have created a connection with typ "Cloud Data Integration" without path prefix. When using this connection in databuilder I can see for example all models in path sac in less than 1 minute. No performance issue.

I have created an incident to SAP on the whole issue. But so far they have only put me off with the workaround you already mentioned.

Thank you for your patience and support through out the events. Please feel free to call us with our first name and drop your queries here or email us.

entry.title: SAP PI/PO to CIG Integration
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

(Required solution on URGENT basis)
customer have already existing PI/PO (On Premise) and build our own mapping in the PI/PO.

We are faced with the challenge that we want to connect CIG with the SAP PI/PO (On Prem).

When we enable integration via PI middleware in sap s4/hana we do not see the option for web services while set up the interface. Please find attached screenshot for your reference.

SPRO>>SAP Reference IMG>> Integration with other sap components>>manage gateway spend&network for buyer>>Global setting>>Enable integration Via PI middleware

While setting up the business network interface.

Please provide the step for how to configure web services for integration via PI middleware.

Kindly suggest solution for PI/PO to CIG connectivity.

entry.title: Re: TM Freight Order Integration with EWM Vehicle and Tra...
entry.content:
Hi Vjaijo,

Unfortunetely I did not find a solution as we followed a different approach on integrating containers with EWM for our use case.

We kept container number as external id in FO TU and transfer it to TM via BAdI Implementation.

But as a hint for you to deep dive into your investigation take a look in inbound mapping of LDAP Message in EWM. There the mapping of TM Hierarchy happens and EWM Objects are created. Maybe you find a spot an how to change the behaviour of the system to achiev your desired outcome:

/SCWM/CL_BIF_SR_TOLDAP_RQ_SRV->MAPIN_HIERARCHY_ITEM

entry.title: Re: TM Freight Order Integration with EWM Vehicle and Tra...
entry.content: Hi Vijaijo

entry.title: Re: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4
entry.content: If you used the standard XML port, then it would be a bug. Did you check SAP Support? (search IDOCS_OUTPUT_IN_XML_FORMAT)

entry.title: Re: Firebase legacy Cloud Messaging API will be discontinued
entry.content: Thank you very much!

entry.title: What are steps and prerequisite to create a content repository using CMIS as a content server
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am new to SAP Hana, and here I am trying to creating a content repository (using /nOAC0 tcode) with storage type as "CMIS Content Server", but I am not sure what are prerequisites for this.

following are steps I did - 

1. go to /nOAC0 tcode and entered respective details and selected Document Area as ArchiveLink and storage type as 'CMIS Content Server'
2. next, I entered value of RFC destination, here I tried to create a new RFC destination using 
a. TYPE G (Http Connections to external server) - when I created this (using /nSM59), it got saved but with error or warning message as 'Direct Connect to host:port failed'
b. TYPE 3 (ABAP connections) - here I did created a RFC destination but when I used this in RFC destination field of #2, then it was giving 'Permission Denied, Check destination {destination_name}'
3. resulting I am unable to create a Content Repository using CMIS as Content Server

I need your expertise in above problem scenario I am having and also on following questions -

1. what and which RFC destination connection type needs to used, also do we need a certificate for the given server
2. how to properly create a RFC destination
3. How this CMIS content server is different from HTTP content server 

I appreciate your support.

 

Thanks,
Abhishek

entry.title: Re: /scwm/adgi - Post GI - API or FM
entry.content:
Hello Nikhil,

movement posting from transaction /SCWM/ADGI is done using FM /SCWM/GM_UPDATE. You can check by setting up a breakpoint on this FM.

BR

Abhi.

entry.title: Get record Collection of specific ids
entry.content: Hi everyone, how to get the records from a datasource using a specific list with ids in it? Is this possible with the current Get Record component/module .Thanks for your response.

entry.title: Re: LoadLibrary for observer failed SAP B1 DI API
entry.content:
Hi Bryan-SG,

Please perform below operations and test if the issue still occurs.

1. Login as an administrator.
2. Check that your user profile on the workstation has a temp folder defined and there is sufficient disk space.
3. Locate the Temp folder by going to Start -> Run and type %temp%.
4. Locate the SM_OBS_DLL folder and delete or rename it.
5. Locate the Temp folder by going to C:\WINDOWS\Temp.
6. Locate the SM_OBS_DLL folder and delete or rename it.
7. Uninstall the DI API from Add/Remove Programs.
8. Install the DI API from your latest patch with full admin rights (Run as administrator).

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Comparator Issue i...
entry.content: Ismail, Indeed Williams answer is correct. I overlooked the single operator usage .

entry.title: Re: When changing text interpretation to HTML Crystal res...
entry.content:
Ok I sorted it out by using standard HTML colour which is MidnightBlue:

 

if isNull({V_QUOTE_LINES.CUSTOMER_PART}) or {V_QUOTE_LINES.CUSTOMER_PART} = "" then "<p style='color:MidnightBlue;'>" + {V_BI_LASER_QUOTE.DESCRIPTION}+ "</p>"
else if NOT(isNull({V_QUOTE_LINES.CUSTOMER_PART})) or NOT({V_QUOTE_LINES.CUSTOMER_PART} = "")
then "<p style='color:MidnightBlue;'>" + {V_BI_LASER_QUOTE.DESCRIPTION} + "<br>(<b>YOUR PART NUMBER: </b>" + {V_QUOTE_LINES.CUSTOMER_PART} + ")</p>"

entry.title: Deprecation of annual posting method "classic"
entry.content:
Hey There,

I have a question concerning the Decprecation of the annual posting method "classic".

I wanted to check whether we use this accrual method, but unfortunately, I cannot find the annual posting method in the time account types (even when accrual frequency period is selected).

Does this mean we do not use the field and therefore are not affected by the deprecation?

Thanks for your help and input.

entry.title: Re: AMDP – Error with Customer Namespaces and joined CDS View with Parameters
entry.content: Dear Sandra, well I never said (Hopefully) that the /xxx/ works on hana db. Well, yes I worked in the past a short time directly on a HANA DB, but this seems no longer the common way to do things. I know that on Hana DB there are no "/" in the names. However, the table names given by the Application server including CDS views and all the new stuff are created in the customer namespaces with the "/". Using an AMDB I only know the names with the "/" and not the may be exisiting corresponding names at the DB, since I can't take a direkt look.

Kindly refer below screen-shot for your reference. loaded metadata in Dev System.

entry.title: Contracts data download from Ariba
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to download all of the contracts data from Ariba to migrate to another external system. We are after following information from contracts:

  • Header data
  • Team members
  • Documents including savings form, d-forms
  • task details
  • contracts history

ITK used to the the only option to download all of this data from contracts as the support is now discontinued by SAP we are looking for alternate options. I checked API's and not all the above mentioned data set is possible using API's.

Can any one throw some light and provide best possible ways to download the data from Ariba contracts.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements - Save Variant/Layout not working...
entry.content: HTML5.v1.CssDefaults are a UI only annotation. They need an annotation.xml file to be applicable.

Could you tell us more about the kyma setup?
- do you plan to use the NATS backend for eventing or the event-mesh backend?
- for nats: did you install the nats module?
- can you give us information about the status of the eventing module?

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Service with Advanced Execution in SAP S/4HANA 2023

@Eliel In general all the functionality which was available with maintenance order, should work with billable maintenance order also. But there will be some exceptions to this general rule.

Please feel free to try this out in the system and provide your feedback.

entry.title: How to query OM custom infotype in Payroll
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Employees are to be paid Location-based allowance. So, we created custom infotype NNNN in OM to save the amount or % of Basic. Now, I need to query this field (of amount or % of Basic) in my custom infotype NNNN related to the Org Unit (ORGEH) of the employee while payroll execution.

May I know 'How to query OM custom infotype in Payroll?'

Thanks n Regards,

Bindumadhav Ambike

+91 8850974524, 9869028264

entry.title: Re: Loading Reuse S1 Component from Manage Material coverage app gives errors
entry.content:
you can using the yo commands for reference https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-sapui5-applications/developing-a-reusable-ui-library_d3c4e460-17b1-4fd0-8d85-04cae8eea3a1

and that is what is mentioned in the app extensibility for manage material coverage app the table in this app is part of the pp_mrp_reuses1 component which we have deployed as a customized library and referenced it inside the manage material app.

entry.title: Green Glucose Reviews (CritiCal CustomeR WarninG!!) EXPosed Ingredients oFFeR$49
entry.content:
Green Glucose Reviews - Real Ingredients

What Is Glucose—Green?
Green Glucose is an organic superfood supplement that effectively treats various health problems. According to the makers' claims, this combination may help people who want to boost their energy, enhance digestion, blood sugar regulation, reduce inflammation, and rid their bodies of toxins. It also increases satiety, which reduces cravings. Green Glucose is a balanced combination of prebiotics, probiotics, enzymes, greens, fibre, and antioxidants, just like the majority of greens supplements.


Here, the designers did something that maybe very few others have done: they included adaptogens. How significant are these elements in the first place? We must read through the ingredient list in order to fully comprehend what Green Glucose performs in the body.

=> Read more on Green Glucose...

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud, Private edition Upgrade Questions
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We would like to seek clarification for a customer S/4HANA upgrade project that runs on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition at the moment. 

Are you able to share the upgrade strategy and approach when you upgrade S/4HANA Cloud, Private edition from 1909 to latest release?

Questions:

1) Is it in-placed upgrade since Silent Data Migration (SDMI) minimizes the business downtime? Or you will system copy from BAU landscape and create a Project landscape then perform the upgrade?


2) If it is in-placed upgrade, what's your recovery strategy if the upgrade fails half-way?  

3) If it is in-placed upgrade, after upgraded DEV system running latest S/4HANA version 2023, can the SAP transport created in new DEV S/4HANA 2023 still able to transport into BAU Prod system running for example S/4HANA 1909?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN add component item category 'N'
entry.content: Hi I am using the same FM to add components to Production order, But getting error as purchasing Org not responsible for plant. I have tcode ox17 plant is assigned to purchasing org. Kindly help to resolve issue.

entry.title: Prevent users from navigation in Sap analytics cloud menu
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a portal in BTP where users can access to tiles that runs reports and planning applications in SAC.

Is there a way to prevent users from navigating in files or any menu in SAC ? When they access to a report, they have access on top of the screen to the navigation panel and then can navigate through SAC Menu :

How could we prevent them from doing that ?

thanks

Mat

entry.title: How to integrate sap build work zone for knowledge base in agent desktop as a mashup?
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Service Cloud Version 2. I want to integrate SAP Build Work Zone as a mashup in Agent Desktop.
Please guide me step-by-step how to achieve this.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Service Cloud @Trinidad

entry.title: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content:
Hello, 

I was trying to use de Cost Roll Up functionality, but I don't understand very well the output value.

I am trying it with Cost Rollup Transportation Share profile for which the target KF is NAGCSTTRANSPORTUNITCOST, and there are several inputs:

  • NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST
  • NAGTOTALRECEIPT
  • NAGPROJECTEDINVENTORY
  • NAGTRANSPORT
  • NAGPRODUCTIONCOMPONENT

 

In this case, I have one material (RW1) which is needed in the location Plant (lead time=0, pratio=1).

I have introduced some values into NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOSTRATE, so I have:

But I don't understand which calculation is made by the profile and the Network  Aggregation Operator job. How is NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOSTRATE obtained?

I would really appreciate it if someone could explain it to me.

Best regards,

Elena Muñoz

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA International Trade-Intrastat declaration, which plants to you add in POI tcode
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In SAP S/4 HANA International Trade module for Intrastat declaration, in the transaction code /SAPSLL/POI_EDIT (Providers of Information), which plants do you add in the below 2 sections of the screenshot ("Plants" section and "Delivering Plants in Intercompany Sales" section). Please clarify.

S4H 2023-Providers of Information

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi Community Team.

I have subscribed to a lot of topics and therefore receive a lot of notifications from the SAP Community.

However, since the changeover of the Community Platform, the notifications have been sent to the wrong email address.

The emails are now sent to the Universal ID address, which is my private email address. If I have understood this correctly, the use of the private email address is exactly the reason for the Universal ID.

However, I don't want the notifications from the SAP Community in my private mailbox. They should go to the business email address.

This was the case before the changeover to the Community Platform.

I don't want to change the email address of my Universal ID.

Is there a way to change the email address for the notifications independently of the Universal ID?

 

Kind Regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Notes on installing SAPGUI for Java for macOS
entry.content:
Hello @dylan-drummond ,

thank you for your reply... 

Only they can really answer that, but they don't really talk about it anywhere. I've only just introduced the topic because I've only just had a system other than Windows, and I'm facing this difficulty which, in my view, doesn't make any sense. For example, I have to run a virtual machine on the MAC to be able to use SAP correctly, it really makes no sense to me.

But ok, let's hope SAP talks about this in the near future.

Thanks again for your reply.

entry.title: SAP RAP : Read Method is not triggered for Filter Condition or any read operation
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have a Simple requirement for Rest Read API where using SAP RAP.

The requirement is to send Error message for while read API based on Search parameters .

I Created BO objects and try to implement Read method for same but read Method is not triggering .

Thanks in advance for helping .

 

URL : https://1374dadc-372f-46e3-a692-b2bd57ae0ee4.abap-web.us10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata4/sap/yap_testview_srv_o4/srvd/sap/yap_testview_srv/0001/YAP_CDS_VIEW_NEW1?$filter=(TravelID%20eq%20%27816%27)

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Sup...
entry.content: Thank you Michael for taking your time to answer my question.

entry.title: Re: Inspection type 03 result recording accept reject imp...
entry.content:
Hello Kiran,

In standard , there is no such validation existing in system where system will restrict the posting 04 inspection lot based on the rejection of 03 inspection type.

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: Re: Unlock user id via sql(oracle) command
entry.content: I wish I had seen this advice earlier.Loggin out of sql promt is what I was missing.

entry.title: Re: We are currently at ASE SP03 PL11 Should we move Prod...
entry.content:
There is a serious issue in SP04 PL04  (and SP04 PL03 and SP03 PL12 - PL14) that affects encrypted databases. See SAP note

3400916 - SYB: Potential database corruption and error 605 on encrypted databases

If your database is encrypted make sure you install a version that fixes the issue of SAP note 3400916. 

Personally I suggest to move to SP04 PLx rather sooner than later - SP03 is being phased out - PL15 is the last  PL for SP03 that will be released. 
Wrt to stability I think there is not difference between SP04 and SP03

entry.title: Re: Late Coming and Early Departure Detection for Double Shifts on the same day - SF Time Tracking
entry.content:
Wowow !

This is a very creative approach to indeed cover something that I was not expected to be able to be covered in SF !

Congratulations. And thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Best practice how to deal with action parameters in R...
entry.content:
OData best practice for filtering results is using the $filter query option and express your desired result as a filter condition on the result structure. Assuming you result is basically an array of objects with a field Plant, you would pass

$filter=Plant eq '1003' or Plant eq '1004'

Worst practice is tunneling your own "query language" through a string parameter: you are in full control of what you do within the single-quoted string value and how to interpret the string as a "command" to do whatever you want - wipe the database, inject some code snippet, or treat it as an ABAP select-option to filter your result. This also means that you have full responsibility for validating and securely interpreting the content of your "command string".

entry.title: SAP BTP Virtual Event for Armenia, Georgia, and Kazakhstan
entry.content:
Get set for this exciting virtual event all about SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), to learn directly from SAP's BTP experts themselves. It's free and open to all, but we've tailored it specifically for our partners, customers, and prospects from Armenia, Georgia, and Kazakhstan.

Day one is designed for everyone, whether you're a business leader, IT professional, or SAP enthusiast and features interactive showcases of SAP BTP cloud offerings for various industries, and presentations by our partners LeverX and RedRays.

On day two, we'll delve into more advanced topics aimed at our consultants and developers from partner and customer organizations.

📅Dates: May 7 and 8, 2024  🕗Time: 08:00 CET | 10:00 AMT | 11:00 Asana

📝Register Here

May 7, 2024 Agenda

BTP Overview and Industry scenarios: targeted for mixed audience

  • Explore SAP BTP in a NutshellI - In this session we will introduce SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) as a leading innovation platform redefining the landscape of enterprise solutions. Delving into the core capabilities of SAP BTP, this session aims to provide participants with a comprehensive overview of how this cloud platform empowers businesses to thrive in the digital era. Whether you're a business leader seeking to future-proof your enterprise or an IT professional looking to harness the latest technologies, this session offers a valuable opportunity to explore the transformative potential of SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Transforming Industries: A Dive into Customer-Focused SAP Business Technology Platform Solutions - This session will provide an overview of how various industry professionals can revolutionize their operations and customer experiences through SAP BTP. With a spotlight on customer-centric business use cases, participants will discover how it acts as a catalyst for transformation through using mobile applications, seamless data integration, optimization of processes, and leveraging AI technology. The session will cover innovative use cases for optimizing processes, maximizing asset performance, and driving value in the heavy industry sector. In addition, approaches will be presented for delighting customers, driving growth, fostering loyalty, and staying ahead in today's competitive landscape through seamless integration, automating processes, and Low-Code-No-Code application development.
  • Partner + Customer presentation -  LeverX
  • Taking Your SAP BTP Application Security to the Next Level: Insights from SAP Partner RedRays - Security is a top priority for SAP BTP, and the platform provides robust security features and best practices to help organizations protect their data and systems from threats. In this session by RedRays CTO Vahagn Vardanian, you will learn how you can take your security to the next level and ensure the protection of your sensitive data and systems on SAP BTP. RedRays is a cybersecurity company that provides SAP BTP custom application security audit services, that help to discover and remediate potential security threats in applications built by SAP customers or partners,  such as vulnerabilities, insecure configurations, and incorrect permissions.

May 8, 2024 Agenda

Keeping the Core Clean: targeted more for technical audience 

  • Clean Core Strategy and Overview - An ERP clean core strategy is the way forward for organizations to use the latest release, minimize or eliminate modifications, and run with cloud-compliant extensions and customizations. Join this session to learn how it allows rapid innovation, better execution and efficient operations; and how the adoption of SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) is key for this strategy.
  • Extensibility lowCode: SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Build WorkZone - Explore SAP's low-code solutions for building apps, automating processes, and creating employee and customer portals.
  • Integrations: SAP Business Accelerator Hub, Integration Suite, Edge Integration Cell
  • Efficient DevOps with SAP BTP - DevOps enables development teams to achieve a high-level of agility and quality - also for your extension projects on SAP BTP! In this session, get a quick overview of SAP's recommended approach that allows to foster agile development with DevOps principles for SAP-specific extension use cases on SAP BTP with ease, as part of your cloud transformation!

entry.title: Re: SAP UI5 How to keep a view Session alive on TV?
entry.content:
as with any statleess http-base app, this would require to continuously poll an endpoint on the backend, so the session doesn't die.

https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/setInterval might help here - but be careful of not doing this on the main thread to avoid blocking the UI. Instead, either do it in a web worker (https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Web_Workers_API) or as an async function/Promise (e.g. famous "sleep" one-liner 

const sleep = duration => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, duration))

hth, v.

entry.title: Re: Non-Recurring Deduction/Payments & Recurring Deduction in EC for replication
entry.content:
@AlexSampayo2 I have the same question, unfortunately nobody replied to you. Did you find a solution? 

I found this Additional Payments (Infotype 0015) | SAP Help Portal based on the input of ticket 3109295 - BIB framework IT0014/IT0015 - Cost center &/& blocked against direct postings on & - KI260 - SAP for Me but I don't know if this really works.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Merge different payloads to single
entry.content:
InputPayload (Json) -> convert to xml -> use message mapping to map the input payload fields to api fields -> trigger api call -> response returned is in xml format, merge xml input with xml output, create a mapping that merge them on last output --> convert to json --->send payload.

 

Save xml InputPayload into a property and put a Message Modifier where body is merged  xml

 

<root>

<input>${property.InputPayloadXML}</input>

<data>${body}</data>

</root>

 

so you can merge them from input and attach data (if you have a key to find them) 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to assign storage bin to multiple production supply area?
entry.content:
Hello together,

our client is also requesting the described Gap, to have a common staging Bin assigned to multiple PSAs.

@JuergenPitz The business requirement in our scenario is quite clear I think. It is requested to stage materials that are used on several work centers at the same time (each of them is having a separate PSA), to a "common" material Bin. Only materials that are specific to each production order like packaging material is staged directly to the GM Bin of the PSA. The idea behind that is saving space in the production area, to not have 10 pallets of the same material at the same time on the shop floor. Since these materials are not used all the time, replenishment via planned repl. or crate part does not solve our Gap.

Did someone of the people involved in this chat made some progress on the topic in the last months? @deepanshulohia @former_member809407 

I would be really glad to receive some feedback from you.

KR
Laurenz

entry.title: Re: Third Party Vendor for Redemption - Rewards and Recognition - SF compensation
entry.content:
Hi,

We will implement RnR with one of customers and they are asking more info on the integration between SF and redemption partners.

Currently Xoxoday is the only 3rd party that is registered in the SAP store. I read that Hawk Select from Blackhawk Network was also part of the SAP store in 2021, but it's no longer there. Is anyone aware of extra partners that will be registered in the SAP store in the future? I read someting on Vantage Circle f.e.. 

Any extra info on integration with redemption partners is welcome here 🙂

Thanks,

Laura

entry.title: SAP Hybris Marketing: Customer Data Upload
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to write an ABAP program to upload a large volume of customer data into SAP Hybris Marketing on-prem version 1909. Please suggest a solution.

Thanks in advance,

Hammad.

SAP Marketing SAP Hybris as a Service

entry.title: Does SAP BN4L support Strategic Freight Procurement process ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on Strategic Freight Procurement (SFP) setup on SAP S/4 HANA 2022. I would like to understand if BN4L supports SFP or not.

As I see BN4L Help page, I don't find any information related to this, so I suppose for now it doesn't support. Also, Is this on SAP BN4L roadmap ?

Best Regards,

Raju

SAP Transportation Management SAP Business Network for Logistics #SFM #SFP

entry.title: AIF Fixed Value (RFC Destination)
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I have a question about the AIF Fixed Value settings in AIF/CUST.

We have sperate RFC Destinations per manufacturing plants. Is it possible to have more that one entry FV_WMEJO_RFCDEST in the fixed value table. 

I did see that there is a sperate table under "define fixed values". What will have to be entered in the fixed value table to be able to maintain more than one RFC destination for FV_WMEJO_RFCDEST? 

Thank you for any hints. 

Best Regards

Christopher

entry.title: Re: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-...
entry.content: You should have an .hdbgrants artifact where you will define the authorizations for the application_user (_RT user) see details here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4505d0bdaf4948449b7f7379d24d0f0d/f49c1f5c72ee453788bf79f113d83bf9.html#loiof49c1f5c72ee453788bf79f113d83bf9__section_a2m_ctf_cy

A natural male vitamin called EndoPump boosts testosterone levels, libido, and quality. Its organic components energise the reproductive system and promote healthy blood flow. The dietary supplement supports the endothelium, which increases nitric oxide production. This dilates blood vessels and arteries and improves blood flow. Prostate health is addressed and advanced by the EndoPump formula by reducing inflammation.

=> Read more on EndoPump...

Any guy can use EndoPump, regardless of age or health. Your body is rejuvenated, fatigue is reduced, and overall health and stamina are promoted. By increasing synthesis, the supplement supports normal function. Only organic ingredients that have passed quality, potency, and purity testing go into making EndoPump. The ingredients are created at a facility in the United States that complies with GMP and FDA production requirements.

Over 15,000 men have benefited from the EndoPump supplement, according to the official website. The recipe contains no toxins, allergies, genetically modified organisms, stimulants, preservatives, or additives. In just two weeks, EndoPump, a fast-acting vitamin, completely changes your body. The manufacturer takes any doubts away by providing a 90-day money-back guarantee on all plans bought through the Official website.

=> Limited Time Only: Visit the official website to save 70% on EndoPump!

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI Function to Retrieve Domain Values?
entry.content:
I think what you are looking for are the F4-Help Values. There are remote-enabled BAPIs, which can be used here:

BAPI_HELPVALUES_GET
BAPI_HELPVALUES_GET_SEARCHHELP

Though I am not sure, whether they work for any kind of structure/input fields, or only for BAPI input fields.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud integration with SAP CPI through an API
entry.content: try with postman and next with HTTP Adapter.

entry.title: Build Apps data binding issue with S/4 onpremise btp destination
entry.content:
Hi Builders,

I tried to connect my S/4 HANA onpremise to my destination and tried connect with Build Apps, I got an issue.

I add destination like this.

And I tried connect through BTP destination directly, it occurred error.

 

So I tried this way, BTP destination REST API integration. But it still occurred another issue.

I integrated until below part well, but I can't bind data. 

I used this path : /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer

Test results are doing well too.

But when I tried to bind list component, It can't fit with 'incompatible'.

I don't know why this can not show my data entities and fit to list component.

Anyone can please help this?

 

#BuildApps #Build

entry.title: Re: ETL Business Analytics with SAP Signavio
entry.content: Thank you for sharing the knowledge, @Keyur_N_Shukla

entry.title: Value Unlocked! How customers benefit from SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
It's a wrap! The Unlock the value of SAP HANA Cloud webinar series has come to an end. Over the past couple of weeks our dear customers, Black Horse One, Lufthansa Technik, Żabka Polska and Lexmark shared their respective SAP HANA Cloud use cases with you. They range from intelligent data applications and application development to integration and migration.

If you had no chance to join them live, I have good news for you, the recordings are now available on demand! Register for free, to access all four recordings and the respective resources shared during the webinars. If you are not sure whether the series or single webinars are a fit for you, then have a look at the below summaries to get a first idea of the contents.

Webinar Series Visual

🏇 Building a powerful, reliable, high-performance data solution with Black Horse One

Today businesses face numerous challenges, that make essential cloud qualities such as performance, reliability, and trustworthiness necessary. Explore how Black Horse One leverages SAP HANA Cloud for their high-performance data infrastructure in this session. Witness the shift from manual to digital processes, enabling real-time access for fans to live video streams and competition stats, ensuring stakeholders are consistently satisfied with smooth performance. Additionally, dive deeper into the capabilities SAP HANA Cloud offers to kickstart the development of your intelligent data app.

 

✈️ Developing a strong and trusted data application for price management, purchasing and supply chain of spare parts for Lufthansa Technik

Data management needs to be flexible and efficient alike. Discover SAP HANA Cloud, the cloud-based database solution crafted to meet these criteria. Gain insight into how Lufthansa Technik is running custom, crucial applications on vast amounts of data, offering a dependable and economical base for modern businesses. Understand how you can enhance your enterprise with a high-performing, cloud-based structure. Participate in this session to understand the advantages Lufthansa Technik gains from SAP HANA Cloud. Moreover, grasp the application development capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud and how they can assist you in achieving a competitive edge. Moreover, don't miss out on the live demo of SAP HANA Cloud that has been shown during the webinar.

 

🛒 Efficient data access for apps and services in Żabka Polska's hybrid landscape

Get rid of duplication, ensure streamlined access to vital data, allocate space for reports, and replicate on-premise data utilizing SAP HANA Cloud. Manage, regulate, and enhance business processes by conveniently accessing information in a dynamic, hybrid setting. Explore the advantages of employing an in-memory cloud database in Żabka Polska's integration scenario. Furthermore, get insights into offloading workload and accelerating performance when replicating data from SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud.

 

🖨 Lexmark maximizes technology investments and improves cost-of-ownership with a seamless migration to the cloud

Migrating your on-premise solution to the cloud poses considerable challenges. Participate in this session to learn more about the factors driving Lexmark's migration. Gain insights into the smooth transition from SAP HANA on-premise to SAP HANA Cloud, that helped to optimize technological investments and enhanced the total-cost-of-ownership. Additionally, get more information on how SAP can support your migration journey towards SAP HANA Cloud.

Did this make you curious? Then don't miss out and access the replays on demand. Register for free! 

 

Are you looking for more information on SAP HANA Cloud?

Check out these links:

  • SAP HANA cloud and on-premise databases Community page. Your one-stop-shop for news, learnings and more regrading our products.
  • whatsnewinsaphanacloud Community tag. Don't miss new blogposts for SAP HANA Cloud.
  • SAP HANA Cloud playlist on YouTube. Check out our videos about the most recent innovations in out database-as-a-service offering.
